title: Hi, what is the first parag...

history.content: Hi, what is the first paragraph after the header MOBILE? in your realxmarket documentation?

I couldn't find any relevant information about a "MOBILE" header or paragraphs in the RealXmarket documentation at https://doc-hub.xcavate.io/. However, I can offer general guidance on how to create a mobile-friendly header using jQuery Mobile. Please let me know if you'd like more information on that topic.
